body.preview:
Danie, mail received and I have printed out for Pete to read.  All of us will be aware of your comments and we must address everything.

From: Danie Bantjes <danie.bantjes@gmail.com>
Sent: Tuesday,

received: from AS1PR09MB5715.eurprd09.prod.outlook.com (2603:10a6:20b:476::14) by DB9PR09MB6743.eurprd09.prod.outlook.com with HTTPS; Tue, 10 Jun 2025 08:13:03 +0000
